title: Section 3
content: The Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint an air officer1 or a committee consisting of two or more air officers to perform all or any of the functions of the competent authority under this Act for such area as may be specified in the notification.
footnote: 1. The Deputy Chief of Air Staff, vide S.R.O. 321, dated the 20th August, 1955, Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 4.
